issues.claim: Voice consistent with chapter 7 declarative-revelatory register
issues.objection: 7.21 speaks in chapter 7's declarative-revelatory voice (per thesis): the senior who has taught technique through chapters 2-6 now reveals what they have actually understood. Voice does not slip into productivity-blog cadence; does not slip into mystical cadence. STRETCHED tagging is explicit where the verse's metaphysical reach exceeds the operational analog. Coheres with the typology-and-veiling sub-register active across 7.13-7.30. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Verse claims a personal divine agency (vidadhāmy aham — I make firm); engineering analog stays at structural-pattern scope. Counter-example explicitly carves out structurally-inappropriate technique-fit so the analog does not collapse into 'commit to anything.'

notes: Voice in 7.21 is the senior-engineer-revealing voice the chapter has earned by this point. PASS.
